code:
import secrets
import base64
import hmac

_session_csrf_token = None

def generate_csrf_token():
    global _session_csrf_token
    token_bytes = secrets.token_bytes(32)
    token_string = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(token_bytes).decode('utf-8')
    _session_csrf_token = token_string
    return token_string

def validate_csrf_token(received_token):
    global _session_csrf_token
    if _session_csrf_token is None:
        return False
    is_valid = hmac.compare_digest(_session_csrf_token.encode('utf-8'), received_token.encode('utf-8'))
    return is_valid
